key.name: backend-port
key.description: Port the glance Node.js backend listens on (127.0.0.1 only).

key.name: backend-path
key.description: Absolute path to the glance backend entry point. If empty, the extension looks in the install directory and ~/repos/glance/server/server.js.

key.name: auto-start-backend
key.description: If true, the extension spawns the backend on enable and stops it on disable.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often the dashboard polls /api/state. Minimum 5.

key.name: dropdown-width-pct
key.description: Width of the dashboard dropdown as a percentage of the monitor width. 30-100.

key.name: widget-layout
key.description: Ordered list of dashboard widgets. Each entry: { id, enabled, weight }. Unknown ids are dropped on load; newly registered widgets are appended disabled. Edit via the extension prefs or in-dashboard edit mode.

key.name: edit-mode
key.description: When true the dashboard shows per-widget controls (move, resize, hide). Persisted across openings.

key.name: popout-active
key.description: Whether the standalone dashboard window is currently shown. Re-enabled across login if true.

key.name: popout-x
key.description: Last x position of the standalone dashboard window, in stage coordinates.

key.name: popout-y
key.description: Last y position of the standalone dashboard window, in stage coordinates.

key.name: popout-width
key.description: Last width of the standalone dashboard window in pixels. Minimum 400.

key.name: popout-height
key.description: Last height of the standalone dashboard window in pixels. Minimum 240.
